name: visit-prep-pack-pdf-deliverable
description: End-to-end deliverable. Agent gathers the full day's clinic for Dr. Solomon, builds per-patient context, and renders the visit-prep PDF to /tmp/visit-prep-2026-06-02.pdf for download.
input_message: Build me a printable visit-prep pack for my 2 June clinic
expected_behavior: Resolves the user as Dr. Solomon + the date as 2 Jun 2026 without asking. Pulls schedule -> 3 patients. For each: epic_get_patient, epic_list_conditions, epic_list_medications, epic_list_allergies, epic_list_observations in parallel. Synthesises per-patient focus notes (optionally citing clinical-guidelines-reference). Invokes the visit-prep-pack-pdf skill (code_interpreter executing scripts/render_visit_prep.py). Confirms the /tmp path in chat so file-sharing picks it up. PDF should be 1 cover + 3 patient pages, severe allergies in red, out-of-range labs flagged.
